title: Iceberg Avro table logical error on delete
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/t0/', format = 'Avro');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
DELETE FROM t0 WHERE TRUE; --Bad cast logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'Bad cast from type DB::ColumnNullable to DB::ColumnVector<long>'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000271aa372
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x00000000143745a9

3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000cff6ad1
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<String, String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type>, String&&, String&&) @ 0x000000000cff5476
5. src/Common/assert_cast.h:48: DB::ColumnVector<long> const& assert_cast<DB::ColumnVector<long> const&, DB::IColumn const&>(DB::IColumn const&) @ 0x0000000012a8bdce
6. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/AvroRowOutputFormat.cpp:173: void std::__function::__policy_invoker<void (DB::IColumn const&, unsigned long, avro::Encoder&)>::__call_impl[abi:se190107]<std::__function::__default_alloc_func<DB::AvroSerializer::createSchemaWithSerializeFn(std::shared_ptr<DB::IDataType const> const&, unsigned long&, String const&)::$_9, void (DB::IColumn const&, unsigned long, avro::Encoder&)>>(std::__function::__policy_storage const*, DB::IColumn const&, unsigned long, avro::Encoder&) @ 0x000000001f1dc212
7. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x000000001f1db400
8. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/AvroRowOutputFormat.cpp:595: DB::AvroRowOutputFormat::write(std::vector<COW<DB::IColumn>::immutable_ptr<DB::IColumn>, std::allocator<COW<DB::IColumn>::immutable_ptr<DB::IColumn>>> const&, unsigned long) @ 0x000000001f1dbac9
9. src/Processors/Formats/IRowOutputFormat.cpp:31: DB::IRowOutputFormat::consume(DB::Chunk) @ 0x000000001f16f88c
10. src/Processors/Formats/IOutputFormat.cpp:153: DB::IOutputFormat::write(DB::Block const&) @ 0x000000001f16e970
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR, c3 FLOAT) USING DELTA;
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c4 INTEGER, c5 DATE) USING DELTA;
INSERT INTO t2 (c4, c5) VALUES (2, DATE '2023-01-01');
DELETE FROM t1 WHERE c1 IN (SELECT c4 FROM t2 WHERE c5 < DATE '2023-01-02');
key_bug_features: DELETE operation on Iceberg Avro table causes logical error
